summary: White House video captioned 'ASMR: Illegal Alien Deportation Flight.' The audio is the sounds of chains, ratcheting handcuffs, and footsteps on a tarmac. It shows shackled detainees walked toward a parked plane, chains and handcuffs laid out and applied in close-up, and a person climbing the airstairs.

script.scene: Low-angle shot on a wet tarmac: an officer in a hi-vis vest walks shackled detainees in gray sweatsuits toward a parked white jetliner under a bright cloudy sky.
Close-up of feet walking past chains and handcuffs laid out across the pavement; the metallic sounds of the restraints are audible.
Continued close shot of several sets of chains and cuffs on the ground as boots step through them.
Extreme close-up of handcuffs being ratcheted onto a person's wrist inside a vehicle seat; the click of the cuffs is audible.
Upward-angle shot of a person in a plaid jacket climbing the metal airplane stairs against a cloudy sky.
